svg.text: Spectrum — quantum platforms across the EM range
5 GHz → 1550 nm · ~4.6 orders of magnitude · the hard problem
PPLN · χ⁽²⁾/χ⁽³⁾ nonlinear optics · ~50–80% lab efficiency
Google (Willow) · IBM (Heron, Nighthawk, Starling, Blue Jay) · IQM (Radiance) · Rigetti (Ankaa-3) · USTC (Zuchongzhi 3)
Diraq · Equal1 · Intel (Tunnel Falls) · Quantum Motion · SQC
ORCA (PT-2, PA-series) · PsiQuantum (Omega) · Quandela (Belenos) · USTC (Jiuzhang 4.0) · Xanadu (Aurora)
Atom Computing (Phoenix) · Infleqtion (Sqale) · Pasqal (Orion Beta, Orion Gamma) · QuEra (Gemini)
AQT (MARMOT, IBEX Q1) · IonQ (Tempo) · Oxford Ionics
ANU · Caltech · Geneva — research only, no commercial machines
memQ (Er:TiO₂ on SiN) · Princeton (Er:CaWO₄ single-ion) · Caltech (Er:Y₂SiO₅)
